ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Continued To Sep-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington, via Zoom, for and with Avery Kotler, Personal Representative.

Ms. Harrington reports that a tax issue, specifically the pending filing of decedent's tax returns, is causing the delay in closing this matter. Mr. Kotler attempts to provide the court with an update regarding the tax matter, but an issue connecting via Zoom prevents him from doing so.

After brief, additional discussion, the matter is continued to Sep-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Continued To Jul-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington, via Zoom, for and with Avery Kotler, Personal Representative.

Ms. Harrington reports that she is waiting for her client to provide her with bank records and is also working on filing pending tax returns. Mr. Kotler confirms the pending tax returns and advises that the sale of an apartment has been finalized and he is now ready to work on the tax issue. Ms. Harrington requests a continuance of 60 days to draft and file a Petition to Approve Report on Status of Administration.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jul-20-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not Reported.
